message:
Running command: 
# 81 min CPU time / ~22 min elapsed. Rate = ~3.6x CPU. Groups still processing.
# For 98K nets -> groups could be 100K-1M. At 10K intervals, we saw only 20K so far.
# Let's check the strace/proc data to understand what's happening
# Check if there are more than 20000 groups expected
ls /proc/$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)/fd 2>/dev/null | wc -l
cat /proc/$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(VmRSS|VmPeak|State|Threads)"
